reviews.review_title: Love it.... a few tweaks that would help
reviews.review_description: I just used it for a few minutes to try it out.  The visuals are amazing!  So, if you can, I would suggest moving the Question Mark that brings up the help video/tutorial, to a less visually disruptive spot.  Maybe over on the left next to the icon for changing the music.  Both the Question Mark and the Music selection icons could be a little smaller too.   I thing your goal should be to have these things available, without being too distracting.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for taking the time to share this thoughtful feedback. We’re really happy to hear you’re enjoying the visuals in Sound Bath by TRIPP!

Your suggestions around the placement and size of the help and music icons are incredibly helpful, and we completely understand the desire for a more immersive, less visually distracting experience. Feedback like this is especially valuable because it comes directly from people actively using the app in real-world sessions.

We’ve shared your notes with our team for consideration as we continue refining the experience. Thank you again for trying Sound Bath and for helping us make it even better!

With appreciation,
The TRIPP Team

reviews.review_description:
Just tried the Soundbath app by TRIPP on Meta Quest 3—and it’s a whole new level of spiritual technology. 🧘🏽‍♀️✨ From the sacred tones of sound bowls to the immersive visuals, it felt like I stepped inside my third eye. If you’re into VR, healing, or spiritual alignment... this one hits all realms at once.

You can truly zone out in this space. I love the variety of sound bowls, but the rain-infused tones of Liquid Bloom are on another level—absolutely transportive. The visuals are both calming and psychedelic, pulling you into a deep meditative state without effort.

What I appreciate most is the ability to let each sound linger, looping in the background as the graphics sweep you away. It’s the kind of experience that makes you forget time even exists.

I do hope they expand the sound library, because what’s here already feels like a beautiful tease. Still, for anyone who loves meditation apps, sound healing, or simply relaxing and getting lost in VR—this is more than worth it. It's not just an app… it's peace of mind, digitized.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this beautiful review! 
You described the experience in such a moving way. “Stepping inside your third eye.” This was such a cool way to describe your experience, and we’re so glad Sound Bath helped you drop in and feel something deeper.
We hear you on expanding the sound library, and we’re with you. There’s so much we want to create, and feedback like yours helps guide us in the right direction. We will be expanding the library in the near future!
Thanks again for taking the time to share this. It really made our day!!
Best, 
The TRIPP Team

reviews.review_description: I love this, love the visuals and the sound but would really love it if there was more music added.

developer_response.body:
Hi there,
Thank you so much for sharing your kind words! We’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying the visuals and sound in Sound Bath by TRIPP. Your feedback about adding more music has been shared with our team, and we’re so grateful for your support and suggestions as we continue to grow the experience.
With appreciation,
The TRIPP Team ✨
